title: hypochaeris incana var. leucantha
intro: Hypochaeris incana var. leucantha, also known as woolly cat's ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin conditions. Hypochaeris incana var. leucantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
